steps.title: Relate the angle types
steps.content: In this parallel-line setup, each acute angle and each obtuse angle are supplementary. Their measures add to $180^\circ$.

steps.title: Solve for the variable
steps.content:
Add the expressions for one acute angle and one obtuse angle.
$$(4x+49)+(6x+81)=180$$
$$10x+130=180$$
$$10x=50$$
$$x=5$$

steps.title: Find the requested sum
steps.content:
The acute angle measure is $4(5)+49=69^\circ$, and the obtuse angle measure is $6(5)+81=111^\circ$. Then compute $2$ acute angles and $3$ obtuse angles.
$$2(69)+3(111)=138+333=471$$
The answer is 471.
